chinese_news.title: 千里科技再添筹码，或将整合吉利辅助驾驶团队｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
为助力千里科技成为“第二个华为”，吉利决定为它增添新的技术筹码。

36氪从多位产业人士处了解到，吉利中央研究院数百人的辅助驾驶团队，将在近期被整合入千里科技。目前，吉利研究院辅助驾驶团队，已有人收到了转移合同的通知。

有接近吉利的知情人士告诉36氪：“这轮整合后，吉利研究院辅助驾驶团队，被平移至千里智驾与极氪的合资公司千里浩瀚，千里浩瀚今后主要服务吉利这个核心客户。千里智驾可以将更多精力转移至其他主机厂客户。吉利暂定了这样一个整合方案。”针对以上信息，36氪向吉利求证，截止发稿，没有回应。

据公开信息显示，千里智驾是千里科技负责辅助驾驶研发的子公司，千里科技通过重庆江河间接持有千里智驾30%的股份。

千里浩瀚是千里智驾和极氪的合资公司，千里智驾和极氪分别持有千里浩瀚48%、47%的股份。

2025年8月，极氪辅助驾驶团队、旷世科技旗下辅助驾驶子公司迈驰智行，以及吉利研究院少数人，被整合入千里智驾，组成了一个约2000人规模的辅助驾驶研发团队。

有吉利人士对36氪表示，前一轮

chinese_news.title: 连续15年披露ESG报告，自然堂开始把“可持续”做成一门生意｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
在中国美妆行业增长放缓、价格竞争加剧的背景下，越来越多品牌开始重新审视“可持续发展”这件事的商业意义。

5月26日，自然堂集团发布《2025年度可持续发展报告》，这是其连续第15年披露ESG相关内容。相比早期以公益、环保为主的企业社会责任叙事，今年的报告更强调“可量化”与“产业化”：包括首次按照科学碳目标倡议（SBTi）标准制定减碳路径、扩大范围三碳排放披露边界，以及将生物多样性、绿色原料、智能制造与供应链效率直接绑定。

对于当前的中国美妆行业而言，这种变化并不只是“做ESG”，更像是在寻找下一阶段竞争力。

过去几年，ESG更多是国际消费品公司的标准动作。包括L'Oréal、Estée Lauder Companies、Shiseido等国际美妆集团，均已将减碳、绿色包装、生物多样性纳入长期战略，并逐步向供应链、原料采购与工厂体系延伸。

而随着国内美妆行业进入存量竞争阶段，ESG也开始从“附加项”变成影响品牌长期经营的重要变量。尤其是在高端化、研发能力、供应链透明度越来越被市

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜「穿越者」载人航天公司完成新一轮亿元融资，某头部互联网战投领投，探路者等跟投
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，北京穿越者载人航天科技有限公司（以下简称“穿越者”）近日完成Pre-A轮亿元融资，由某头部互联网战投领投，探路者集团等跟投，老股东中天汇富、彬复资本持续加注。光源资本担任本轮独家财务顾问。本轮融资资金将重点用于“穿越者壹号（CYZ1）”载人飞船核心系统研发、地面试验验证及关键技术攻关。

公司方面表示，引入互联网、人工智能、智能制造、户外装备及文旅场景等领域的产业资本，源于商业载人航天在科技、人文、消费与场景协同上的多重需求。这不仅有助于完善产业生态，也将推动太空旅游从“少数人的高端体验”逐步走向“大众化、普惠化”的新阶段。

「穿越者」是36氪长期关注的企业。公司成立于2023年1月，专注可重复使用载人飞船研制与太空旅游运营，致力于打造中国的“龙飞船”，实现为国家和商业低成本送人送货。

过去十年，中国商业航天完成了从0到1的技术验证与基础设施搭建，涌现出近40家商业火箭总体公司。中国商业航天进入政策红利释放、技术加速成熟、资本持续涌入的产业化关键期。

需求侧，载人飞船是商业航天赛道中直接to C的产

chinese_news.title: 铃木敏文去世，他与711的三个反常识故事
chinese_news.summary:
铃木敏文

作者 | 钟艺璇
编辑 | 乔芊

5月25日，柒和伊控股发布讣告，日本7-Eleven创始人铃木敏文已于日前去世，享年93岁。

作为全球规模最大的连锁便利店品牌，7-Eleven与铃木敏文之间是一个续写与重生的故事，但他们的相遇却始于一次偶然。

chinese_news.title: 谁是世界上第二爱泡泡玛特的人？
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 谢芸子

编辑 | 张帆 

一纸权益披露文件，让市场看到段永平对泡泡玛特的热爱绝不止是“口嗨”。

5月27日晚间，段永平与其全资控股的H&H International，同步增持了泡泡玛特的股份，一致行动人持股比例达5.69%，对应约7637.16万股，一跃成为仅次于创始人王宁的第二大股东。

知名投资人的每一次站台，总是能或多或少地提升市场信心。

截至发稿前，泡泡玛特收盘价161.5港元，涨幅4.74%。若以最新股价计算，段永平的这笔持仓对应的市值达到123亿港元。而他对泡泡玛特的态度，也堪称180度的“史诗级逆转”。

就在去年8月，当泡泡玛特的股价逼近历史高点、被称作“新消费茅台”时，段永平唱了反调，表示“看不懂10年后的泡泡玛特。”今年1月，他在雪球回应网友提问时还说，“依然无法理解人们为什么需要这个东西，万一过两年大家都不要了呢？”

两个月后，泡泡

chinese_news.title: 再花22亿乘胜追击，北京城建“龍樾”要抢跑了
chinese_news.summary:
5月28日，北京石景山区黄庄村43号棚户区改造项目SS00-1622-002、SS00-2501-002地块进入现场竞拍，最终该地块由北京城建兴通置业有限公司以底价22亿元摘得，成交楼面价约3.31万元/㎡。

北京城建兴通置业有限公司是北京城建的全资子公司。这是去年第四季度以来，北京城建第三次独立拿地补仓。

图源：天眼查

在拿下石景山黄庄村地块的同一时间，北京城建公布了这个新项目的案名：龍樾璟序。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Trump and Iran reach a nuclear deal framework by June 30, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC/BBC: Trump Truth Social statement + VP Vance 'very close' quote; timing pressure suggests resolution within 8 weeks

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVIDIA's photonics R&D investment yield a commercial product announcement by December 31, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: NVIDIA photonics investment headline; photonics is positioned as 'crucial to AI boom'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX complete its IPO before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: SpaceX IPO prospectus filing live; Blue Origin New Glenn explosion (Hacker News top story, 413 score) removes competing launch cadence pressure and raises SpaceX valuation narrative urgency.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Kalshi's crypto perpetuals annual volume exceed $150 trillion by end of 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Disney secure FCC broadcast license renewals without losing a station by August 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's market cap return above $1.5 trillion before July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap or TradingView Bitcoin market cap chart at market close UTC
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reports BTC 'falls out of top 10 assets' with $1.5T cap dip, but this coincides with a 'record $2.8B ETF nine-day outflow streak'—technical capitulation often precedes reversals; sentiment indicators suggest panic sell-off, not structural breakdown.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Bitcoin ETF outflows are decelerating; $1.5T is a round psychological level with institutional accumulation precedent in 2024-2025 cycles

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum close above $2,000 on any single day before September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap daily ETH/USD closing price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph flags '$1.8K becomes key' support and 'downside pressure,' implying shorts are positioning below $2K; but Ethereum's correlation to AI compute demand (NVIDIA photonics, Kalshi crypto infrastructure plays) suggests upside optionality if macro broadens.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: ETH/BTC ratio weakness + BTC ETF outflows create forced liquidation lows; recovery typically overshoots prior resistance by 10-15%

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the SEC approve at least one spot Ethereum ETF with 24/7 trading by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC official approval orders or SEC.gov investment adviser filings
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk reports 'U.S. regulator says 24/7 trading is great for crypto'; CFTC already approved crypto perps at Kalshi; this signals regulatory acceptance is broadening beyond spot equities into continuous markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Kalshi CFTC crypto perp approvals + ICE 24/7 push + CoinDesk regulator quote all converge on May 2026; spot approval typically follows product innovation by 6-12 months

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Paxos' blockchain stock-clearing approval trigger at least one major exchange or broker to launch on-chain settlement by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official press releases from SEC-regulated equities exchanges or major brokerages announcing blockchain settlement pilot or production launch
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk: 'Paxos wins SEC approval to clear U.S. stocks on blockchain.' This is a regulatory inflection point; traditional finance infrastructure providers will race to integrate to avoid competitive disadvantage.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SEC approval is the gate; downstream adoption lags by 12-18 months as legal/compliance teams build frameworks; first-mover is likely a fintech-native platform (Robinhood, Coinbase equities, etc.)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will XLM (Stellar) maintain a market cap above $2 billion through August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap or CoinGecko market cap snapshot on specified date
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reports XLM up 50%+ this week with no obvious catalyst; this typically signals accumulation before a known event (Paxos blockchain clearing uses Stellar protocol; remittance volume surge). Market narrative will catch up in 60-90 days.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 50% weekly rally on low volume often precedes institutional re-rating; Paxos approval in same news cycle suggests coordinated infrastructure buildout

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductor capex and capital equipment on Dell's 757% YoY AI server revenue surge and NVIDIA's photonics R&D commitment; expect MU and ASML to re-rate higher into 2026-2027 as AI infrastructure capex cycles extend.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Dell 'fastest pace of revenue growth since 2018 IPO' with 757% AI server YoY growth
CNBC: NVIDIA investing billions into photonics as efficiency alternative
CoinDesk: Kalshi perps volume $90T (2025) vs. $28T (2023)—infrastructure demand signal
investment_theses.counter_view: AI capex may be cyclical if model ROI stalls; photonics is unproven and could require 3-5 years before meaningful revenue contribution; semiconductor valuations already price in AI boom.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU (Micron) and ASML; pair-trade as long SMH (semiconductor ETF) / short QQQ if macro softens

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin and Ethereum are in local capitulation mode (ETF outflows, BTC below top 10 assets by mcap, ETH support at $1.8K); expect tactical long into June 2026 as institutional accumulation accelerates post-outflow.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Record $2.8B Bitcoin ETF nine-day outflow streak
Cointelegraph: Bitcoin falls below $1.5T market cap (capitulation indicator)
CoinDesk: Ethereum 'downside pressure' at $1.8K (technical support formation)
investment_theses.counter_view: Outflows could reflect genuine demand destruction; macro Fed rate hold or hike in June-July could reignite selloff; geopolitical escalation (Iran, NATO, North Korea) raises risk-off bias.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perps (5-10% position size) with stop below $60K; long ETH with stop below $1,700; exit into any 15%+ bounce before mid-June FOMC

investment_theses.thesis: Crypto regulatory approval cycle is accelerating (CFTC perp approvals, Paxos blockchain clearing, Kalshi moving beyond prediction markets); long crypto infrastructure plays and DeFi tokens (APT, XLM, HYPE) that benefit from 24/7 regulated trading access.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: CFTC approves first crypto perpetuals at Kalshi and Coinbase
CoinDesk: Paxos wins SEC approval to clear U.S. stocks on blockchain
CoinDesk: ICE pushes 'level playing field' for 24/7 onchain perps; U.S. regulator says '24/7 trading is great for crypto'
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory approval is slow and subject to reversal; Trump DOJ 'lawfare' concerns could trigger crackdown; Chinese regulatory crackdown on crypto (not visible in English news yet—monitor Chinese sources) could depress sentiment.
investment_theses.expression: Long Aptos (APT) and Stellar (XLM); pair with short Solana (SOL) if Aptos gains institutional adoption; use Hyperliquid (HYPE) as leverage play on 24/7 perpetuals volume

investment_theses.thesis: Geopolitical risk premium is building (Iran deal 'final determination,' NATO-Russia tensions, Blue Origin setback reducing U.S. space redundancy); long volatility exposure and gold; short duration equity tech if macro risk-off triggers.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump 'final determination' on Iran deal (unpredictability priced low)
BBC: NATO emergency meeting after Russian drone hits Romania; talks of 'recklessness'
HN top story: Blue Origin New Glenn static fire explosion (U.S. launch capacity risk)
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran deal is likely to close (reduces war risk); NATO has deterred escalation so far; SpaceX redundancy mitigates Blue Origin setback. Risk premium may be overpriced near-term.
investment_theses.expression: Long GLD (gold ETF) and/or long VIX calls (June or July expiry); short ARKK (tech-heavy, duration-sensitive) or Nasdaq 100; hedge with BTC longs (uncorrelated to geopolitical crisis if inflation narrative drives it)

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese consumer/industrial capex signals (36Kr: Geely autonomous driving integration, Qianli AI, SAIC EV exports, OPPO flagship launches) suggest China tech recovery narratives will re-rate; long China-exposed ETFs (KWEB, CQQQ) and Hong Kong tech (0700 Tencent) before Q2 earnings cycle.
supporting_signals: FLAG: 36Kr reports Geely integrating hundreds-person autonomous driving team into Qianli AI (未seen in English media as of 2026-05-05)
36Kr: SAIC (Shanghai Auto Industrial Corp) hitting 100M vehicle production milestone; EKSION EV export ramp in Indonesia
36Kr: OPPO Reno16 series launch signals premium smartphone capex recovery
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese domestic EV market is oversaturated; BYD and NIO dominate; consumer spending has decelerated; Geely/Qianli integration risks execution; Trump tariff escalation could hurt export margins.
investment_theses.expression: Long KWEB (China tech ETF) or KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF; pair with long HK tech (0700 Tencent) if volume confirms; hedge with short yuan (short CNH) if trade war fears rise
